title: Dashboard
description: Implement the dashboard as the landing page. Shows project summary cards with completion percentages, blocking sections list, team activity feed (recent approvals/status changes), and upcoming deadline timeline. Dashboard data comes from a dedicated API endpoint that aggregates across projects and sections.
designContext: GET /api/v1/dashboard returns aggregated data: project summaries (name, completion %, deadline, section counts by status), blocking sections (sections not yet approved/locked), team activity (recent status transitions with who/when), upcoming deadlines sorted by urgency. Frontend dashboard-view.mjs component renders summary cards in a grid, a blocking sections list, activity feed, and deadline timeline. This is the default route (/) in the SPA.
